query:
SELECT 
  eventType,
  COUNT(*) as event_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sessionId) as unique_sessions
FROM events
WHERE eventType LIKE 'ab_%'
GROUP BY eventType
ORDER BY event_count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2vGuTCYzpyNQ1XN.root --database cUKXq5uw3eiWGpv5roCqyH --execute

  eventType,
  COUNT(*) as event_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sessionId) as unique_sessions
FROM events
WHERE eventType LIKE 'ab_%'
GROUP BY eventType
ORDER BY event_count DESC;
